## Severity

<!-- Pick one — be conservative; the wrong severity wastes reviewer time. -->

- [ ] **Critical** — Funds at risk OR the network is halted.
- [ ] **High** — Major functionality broken; not financial.
- [ ] **Medium** — Edge case with workaround.
- [ ] **Low** — Cosmetic / docs / quality of life.
